commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 8:29 And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife's name was Maachah: Dwelt. Literally, "they dwelt. "But Hebrew and Septuagint, "in Gabaon, dwelt the father of Gaboan "(Haydock) who was called Jehiel, (chap. ) or Abiel, 1 Kings ix. (Calmet) The following verses are repeated in the next chapter, (Haydock) and seem to have been originally the same; though now many variations occur, which show that "every Hebrew letter "has not been preserved. (Kennicott).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
